Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: We didn t like most of it The staff were not particularly friendly or helpful There was a problem with our booking and the man on reception was not helpful and the way he dealt with the situation was bad customer service after this I felt awkward and wanted to be out of the hotel as much as possible I have stayed in many hotels through booking com and the service in this hotel was the worst by far Very expensive for the standard we received Stayed in hotels all over the world and this was the most disappointing The photos are very deceiving the pool is tiny the hotel is also quite small The porter was very sweet he was the only positive I can say about the hotel no wonder it wasn t very busy If I can give any advice to the hotel management Invest in customer service training for your reception staff

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: the noise and views of high rise demolition directly in sight line are unavoidable I suppose however the pinxos and wine for happy hour could have been better fresher quality  the pool and deck were lovely

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Poor bar service and very small pool None of us 5 felt like going in In our global opinion this hotel should not be rated 4 star sup   Staff friendly approach though not sufficiently qualified

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The beds are huge and very comfortable The breakfast eggs omelettes are freshly cooked by the chef to your liking The staff are really helpful friendly and speak good English The hotel is so Central and within walking distance of some excellent small restaurants as well as having its own really good hotel restaurant

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The room floor was so dirty that it was not possible to walk in bare foot The patio and swimming pool were very dusty The tapas that the hotel offered in the afternoon were average   The bed and pillows are very comfortable The walking distance to restaurants and touristic places is ideal You can walk to see Gaudi infrastructures and near to take the touristic bus

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Not really a not like just a nice to have More milk provided 4 capsules instead of 2 so I could enjoy more than 1 cup of coffee   Staff friendly and having coffee in the room excellent The complimentary glass of wine and tapas in the evening was a lovely treat at the end of the day beds comfy room nice and quiet

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The rooms were small but very well appointed quiet and very comfortable The staff from top to bottom was friendly and welcoming They were very helpful as well My teen aged granddaughter and I loved this hotel We felt very much at home and would happily return there The buffet breakfast was excellent too

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: I was woken very early one morning by some other guests being extreme noisy in the pool which was below my window  The bed and pillows were very comfortable The location was in walking distance of many sights

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: little bit Expensive for calculation per night  winning location helpful staff clean rooms the staff always willing to help and guide the guests on each problem questions they may have from 17 00 20 00 the guests can enjoy free tapas and wine in the main bar

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Rude staff unprofessional the didn t honor my extended reservation i also found a dead cockroach in gym and called them to clean it they only remove it and didn t even bother to wipe the tool it was on they stole my phone power bank and charger  Location and room decoration only

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: No complaints  This is a Hotel with very friendly and attentive staff From initial welcome at desk the tone was set Staff always able to stop and help with tourist advice The complementary early evening Tapas and WIne is a nice touch Good rooms and quiet

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: A bit expensive   Amazing Breakfast WIFI works on Samsung HTC Windows perfectly Windows are sound proof and the room were soo quiet Nice small swimming pool In the middle of the city it is always a luxe

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Housekeeping was not up to standard They would always leave something out not enough towels not enough body wash didn t take the empty containers dirty dishes or leave fresh cups Room service food is not good at all They have happy hour tapas which are also sub standard  Convenient and central location Rooms facing the main street are a little noisy but it s not bad The balcony was nice Breakfast is good Staff were very helpful in giving directions ad restaurant recommendations

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Price was a bit steep but in line with comparable properties in Barcelona plus we received a free upgrade so then it was a great deal   Top floor suite was wonderful Great views from the terrace Wonderful breakfast Super location

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Room is very comfortable the breakfast was great What i appreciated the most is the friendly very helpful hotel staff I Would highly recommend this well located hotel to first time vistors to Barcelona

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The terrace in the Suite Duplex needs one additional sunbed flat for sunbathing The rooms with terrace on the lower ground misleading impression from the pictures If you want terrace go for the suite duplex instead   Friendly staff fantastic Suite Duplex over 2 floors with great view and a large terrace Absolutely worth the money when in Barcelona Better room than many 5 stars Sun from morning til sunset Will definitively book here again Spacious and clean Good breakfast

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing  Rooms are very elegant quite and comfortable and we had an outdoor terrace Bathrooms are very chic and the shower was super strong The breakfast buffet was extensive and staff were always friendly What s not to like

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Could have had more wardrobe space we did not use the safe I feel this could be taken out and more space for hanging clothes The shower 1st time using the shower floor was so wet should install glass all the way over Overall loved our stay Thank you to all the staff who made us more than welcome upon checking out they asked if we wanted a taxie yes please by the time we were checked out only a few mins our bags were in the taxi   bed comfy tapas and wine were a very nice touch

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Too expensive breakfast too soft bed  Good location near metro station The room was cozy and nice Nice balcony Outside traffic noise but I guess you can t avoid it while living in the centre of Barcelona window isolation was good so the noise was minimized quite good

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Operating hours of the swimming pool only start as of 10AM   Located in a good area Rooms are comfortable with a more classic design Hotel has a swimming pool Good quality breakfast Room was exceptionally quiet located on the ground floor with a terrace

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing   This property was in an excellent location We were upgraded to a beautiful spacious modern room with a terrace overlooking the Grand Via The hotel serves tapas and wine every afternoon La Rambla was walking distance and there were plenty of great restaurants in the area The staff was friendly and helpful We could not ask for more

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Everything was perfect   The staff was very welcoming and friendly After our overnight flight from the US we were exhausted when we arrived at the hotel The staff did all they could to get us into our room early as they had a full house the previous night They also upgraded our room to a room with a view Our room rate had breakfast included and the dining room was beautiful The breakfast was amazing with many choices of cheese meat rolls hot items and drinks Each night at the bar they served tapas and a glass of wine on the house This hotel was centrally located and comes highly recommended from me

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: This hotel was absolutely perfect The room was beautiful and location was superb The surrounding area had fantastic restaurants and great shopping Wine and tapas were served everyday at 5 00 Couldn t have been better

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Shower head didn t spray water very far into bath hard to control temp of water  Birthday Cava was much appreciated staff very helpful in organising events attractions

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Not sure if its best value for money but it was very good for the dates we were in Barcelona easter week   Great location stylish decent sized rooms

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Just passing through so only one night stay Too bad because would have loved to stay longer Spotless updated modern room Very quiet Very comfy beds and pillows Super friendly and helpful staff Room had a patio but was on first floor so view only of the privacy fence when sitting down Lovely pool area Excellent location for walking shopping sightseeing eating Would stay again

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: bed choices during booking I opted for a large bed as opposed to two singles but got two connected singles They did not have available a room with the bed type I booked room in front of building or back windows do sift most noise but you can still hear the street but back to what I liked next day I checked again with front desk and we were moved to a room facing back of the hotel with a king size bed   Short distance to the Plaza Catalunya north of it if you re planning on walking to sires this makes the hotel closer to the Gaudi houses and church but further from the Gothic Quarter and La Rambla Hotel staff are very nice and helpful and breakfast was good with omelette made to order LOVED the part that they check and make the room twice a day we happily participated in the local siesta There s a deck and a small pool in the back but we never got to it

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: I wish breakfast was included in the price   Free wine and tapa service at 5 was good Insulation of the hotel was perfect Despite the busy street and construction works across we never heard a noise Perfect location was a bonus

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: This hotel is great Very clean Staff very professional and always smiling Location great Breakfast includes a large variety of food They offer for free tapas and wine at the bar from 5 to 8

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Had dinner first evening which was good but the atmosphere in the restaurant was cold they need to turn the lights down much to bright food wine was good   Very nice staff breakfast fine overall very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The basic hotel WiFI came out as untrusted We did receive however an alternate net which was OK   The hotel s location is superb The room was smallish but adequate with large bed shower no tub a balcony All the normal amenities were in place and in good quality Other types of rooms seemed to be larger Breakfast was excellent with very good selection Nespresso coffee etc The young lady who attended the breakfast room was very friendly and efficient The 5 8 PM free wine and food was a very welcome after a long day definitely a bonus point as was the gentlemen whop served the wine Overall very good experience

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: FAULTLESS  There are a number of top 100 resturants via trip advisor close to the hotel I went for cocktails next door at the beautiful cotton house Walking distance to the Airport bus that took 20 minutes from Airport to town Location of hotel couldn t be better Reception are so friendly and helpful The free tapa and wine between 5 8pm is a good touch after a long day walking Rooms are clean new hotel about 3 years old Would return in a heartbeat

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing  Very well presented hotel Friendly and helpful staff easy access for wheelchair users Breakfast and restaurant very good comfortable bed and room facilities Great central location

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Swimming pool is outdoor not heated  Location is great access to public transportation is within 5 minutes walk Most top attractions are within walking distance Afternoon tea and topas are excellent love it

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Our stay cost us an extra 120 due to booking coms booking system  We booked a room with a terrace everything was exceptional All the staff were excellent and the complimentary wine tapas between 5 8pm was a must do Would definitely recommend

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: I went with my boyfriend for my 21st birthday and the hotel couldn t have been nicer The staff were incredibly friendly helpful and nothing was too much to ask The location was perfect half an hours walk to the beach and all the other popular tourist attractions The bus from the airport cost 5 90 and stopped 5 mins from the hotel The strip of designer and high street shops were also on the same road Even though the hotel was on a busy road the room was quite and I had a good night s sleep every night There was also free bottles of water in the rooms mini fridge perfect when foreign water tastes awful compared to our English water haha The decking and pool were always in the sun and in the evenings there is free wine tasting and mini tapas for the guests I couldn t fault the hotel Perfection in an even more perfect city Strongly recommend if you re willing to spend a tiny bit more the money is worth it

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Our room was in the centre of the hotel so we didn t have a balcony or a garden As it was just a short break it was fine but If we had gone for longer I would have upgraded   Fabulous family room with lovely comfy beds and nice extras

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: the night receptionist informed us breakfast was untill 11 30 when we arrived at 11 they didn t believe us after a small discussion we got breakfast Also he informed us the room had a nice view but looking at backsides of old buildings is not my perception of beautiful view  Very nice hotel and nice rooms Catalonia is one the best chains to sleep in when you are in Barcelona

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The breakfast we hadn t booked but decided to go one morning Don t get me wrong there was a lot of food to choose from but we didn t know what half of it was little signs would have been nice we couldn t work the 2 coffee tea machines and the two staff working didn t speak much English and were really busy   I felt at home from the minute we arrived The staff were welcoming and very helpful The room was fantastic and very clean it felt like every time we left Day or night our bed was freshened up and towels were replaced Such fantastic service The wine and tapas in the evenings was lovely and fantastic to be complimentary too

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Breakfast was lovely The wine and Tapas time in the evenings was lovely The staff were all very friendly and helpful Great location and rooms are very nice

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The heating system was not working well the first night it was cold and we had to ask for a blanket no blankets available in the room The second night the heating was working because the temperature in the room was higher and yet we could not regulate it   Excellent location very nice hotel conveniently located near public transport Aerobus metro station

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: You can not control the heat ac in the room so I was always hot at night Could not open the window due to traffic noise The shower has the typical Spanish half door so water runs on the floor Not much counter space by sink Minor complaints   Centrally located Nicely decorated with a sweet orchid aroma throughout the hotel Lovely linens and comfy bed Complimentary wine and tapas 5 00 8 00pm in the cozy lobby A special touch and a good way to meet other travelers A wide variety of spread at breakfast The breakfast area was impeccable but the service was mediocre I was there in January but the pool and terrace looked inviting I was sad to leave It felt like home to me I would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The alarming noise from housekeeping while cleaning other rooms of the same floor Moreover an airline privilege card was taken by the housekeeping from my room and after a complaint to the lobby it was returned without any apology   The location the bar and free snacks from 5 to 8 the bartender

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: that I couldn t stay longer   The staff were very professional and attentive and accommodated several requests fast and efficiently We were coming for a family celebration and the five of us were very happy with our booking and would like to return soon Location was simply excellent and the superior rooms are fantastic for some extra space and definitely worth considering as you get good value for money We didn t have breakfast at the hotel as there are many places around where you can enjoy local produce at a fraction of the price

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The water didn t work when we woke up but to be fair they had maintenance staff on the job straight away and the water was working again in just a few minutes   Friendly helpful staff especially a nice guy called James who exceeded expectations with his desire to help us out with various logistical things

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Even with the air con on the room got a bit stuffy and it s too noisy at night to have the windows open having said that this is a common issue with most city hotels   Centrally located for the shops and a pleasant meander through the Gothic quarter to the port Good quality comfortable hotel with a secluded pool and decked area

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: House keeping should take care of the cleaning need pest control time to time The rooms are not sound proof   Staff are very helpful very good location

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Shower temperature not easy to control   Great location and clean room The breakfast was nice as well I would like to stay at this hotel on my next visit

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Breakfast was not very organised Had to wait for things like bacon and eggs and quite a queue developed  The hotel was clean Rooms where great Location was also excellent The free tapas tasting with glass of wine was a nice touch

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The prepayment of the room at check in Quite unusual It wasn t simply a hold on a credit card as other hotels do We were fully charged for our stay Felt like prepaying at a restaurant before being served the food   High quality hotel combined with great staff location and food We travel around the world and stay at 4 or 5 star hotels this definitely ranks in the top 5 and that is not based on its value we stayed through 2016 X mas for 180 eur night breakfast included Considering price I d rank it in the top 1

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: No plug converters and in room phone charger not working Hand held shower damaged rain shower floods bathroom floor   Very comfortable well designed room great location friendly staff turndown service

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: We booked a three single bed room The third bed was a small rollaway not a nice bed like the other two They should not advertise it as three singles   Two of the three beds were very comfortable The staff was very congenial and helpful Happy hour is nice with good canapes and nice red wine no white

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: room was very comfortable although a little on the small size but the terrace made up for this  Hotel is in a very central location for most attractions and within walking distance Staff were very friendly and attentive We had a room to the rear of the building with a terrace which was very quiet

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Although I was alone I was offered an upgrade Instead of being given the king size bed room with a view that I ordered I was given a 2 bed room with a cramped terrace at the back Another problem is that upon arrival the room was cold and still smelling of wet plaster and it took almost a day to heat up above cellar temperature Hence my ratings in the comfort and value for money categories   The hotel is within a 2 minute walking distance from Pla a de Catalunya and very happily situated in a central beautiful neighborhood The room was well furnished large with great design There was very good light and it had two large mirrors out of which one was full vertical The breakfast was also great and the staff nice

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: No English channels on the TV that were not just news   Excellent boutique hotel in great location Very good breakfasts Excellent room with terrace

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Hairdryers were a nightmare I realise this is a first world problem cut out every few seconds Sofa bed wasn t all that comfortable according to my son Minor complaints wouldn t hesitate to stay again   Great location very smart hotel Staff were great Lovely free tapas and drinks in the afternoon

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: I think the breakfast could be better   The best thing about this hotel is the location It takes just a few minutes to get to the center and it s very close to the best shops

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Everything about this hotel was fantastic from the staff to the appearance of the hotel I would re book here in a heartbeat The location is perfect for experiencing Barcelona

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Pillows with synthetic filling are rather hard  Great location in the very heart of the city buetiful modern design of the hotel helpful personnel spacey room comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: not able to check in early girl at the front desk told us we could go to Park Guell at around 4 despite not having prepurchased tickets we walked all the way there and found out that they were sold out Left with terrible bug bites all over our bodies Not sure if it was bed bugs but we didn t want to chance it so we spent our entire first day sanitizing our luggage website shows photos of there being a hot tub no hot tub in reality just a non heated pool this is very deceiving   great location

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Pool was cold but was late October Street vendors on la rambla and barcelonetta beach can be annoying   Excellent breakfast great location for walking to shops and bars One minute walk to metro where you can connect to all areas Tip use the N2 train to and from airport runs every half hour an takes 25 minutes

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Noisy Junior Suite Metro rumbles Street noise Not enough breakfast staff to reset tables   Location Breakfast selection Helpful Staff FREE afternoon Tea

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Towels were average  The bed was very comfortable but above all the staff was outstanding Pleasant always ready to help Could not ask for more The complimentary tea was an added bonus After a long day out visiting it was very nice to sit in a comfortable lounge with a delicious tea and a choice of sandwiches and cakes served by a smiling and helpful waitress A wonderful stay overall

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: During my recent stay the breakfast selection was limited in comparison with my previous stay I had to wait untill 14 00 for my room I arrived from the airport at 10 30 In May not only did I receive my room immediately but I was upgrade to a suite I realize that this I was lucky in May and is not always possible I requested a late checkout due to the scheduled time of my return flight Of course I was willing to pay I was flatly turned down I felt that a little effort could have been invested in my request especially given the fact that I was a returning guest and currently a guest for five nights When I was 15 minutes late for checkout I was reminded with a phonecall This was not necessary since the gentleman at the reception desk was well aware that I was getting ready to check put It took me about 5 mins to leave the room On the upside my luggage was held for me and the staff was courteous in retrieving it for me and getting me a cab when the time came to depart   I was a returning guest My previous stay was in May 2016 The hotel is in a great location Quiet but close to the center Not too big which is an advantage in my opinion The afternoon complimentary tea and snacks was a nice touch Used this service once The waitress tending to the guests was very cordial The housekeepers were very cordial as well The floor wasn t clean when I checked in but was cleaned at my request when housekeeping arrived the next day

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Only complaint is that there was no plug point for kettle but not a problem just moved it to bedside to use Breakfast was ok but adequate   Well lit rooms and bathroom Great rooms roomy and well equipped Very quiet location just minutes away from all the action Complimentary afternoon snacks were nice

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Seems as if the reception migth be understaffed at times We had to wait almost 20 minutes for check in while the one person at the desk was handling a group of 4 persons   Excellent beds Bathroom pure luxery coffe tea in the room light in safe always afraid to forget something in the dark Perfect location Did not have breakfast

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Had a two story suite that was nice but the bottom floor was basically a bathroom with a couch in it As it also served as the entrance to the suite it was a bit awkward to walk in and find yourself in a bathroom with no door The steam from the shower set off the fire alarm more than once and sent the very attentive staff to knocking on the door while one was showering In my opionion just a bad design for a suite Housekeeping could use a bit of work as well They refilled some things and not others turn down services was a chocolate on the bedstand why not turn down the bed while your e there and althought the place was far from dirty it was obvious that they did not vacume and mop the floors daily Overall they were just a bit inconsistent   Great location with all of the ameneties and access to downtown Barcelona that you could want The Metro station is just down the block and La Ramblas and Plaza Catalunya are as well The view from the balcony of the top floor suite was great Mt Tibidabo Sagarada Familia and the rest of the city lights at night were impressive The facilites are modern and updated with some minor problems

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Shower head was positioned poorly so had to manually hold it over myself making it difficult   Lovely hotel in a good central location Very nice room with balcony Friendly staff good room comfortable bed

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: My mother and I enjoyed returning to the hotel in the late afternoon relaxing discussing the day s adventures with a nice glass of sangria and tapas This gave us an opportunity to re fuel before our evening activities

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Been traveling Europe for the last 30 days and I can honestly say this has been the best The Hotel is Quiet Comfortable Perfectly located but above all that the Staff is Amazing when you add everything together you get the perfect stay Will be back for sure

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Breakfast provision fine though hot drinks a bit hard work Ok for evening meal but not great Not much atmosphere   Very helpful and friendly staff especially the barman Outside terrace excellent facility

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Location is ideal great for walking to sights as well as next to a Metro Very friendly staff across the whole hotel The hotel is very nice indeed very tastefully decorated and the afternoon drinks snacks from 5 8pm are a nice touch

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: For us nothing  Everything that a first class hotel should be Spotlessly clean big and comfortable rooms and brilliantly helpful and pleasant staff The central location was great yet away from the crowds Perfect for the aerobus and metro station outside We had a slight difficulty with the room security safe but it was immediately dealt with Brilliant staff

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Restaurant was mediocre   Great central location a short walk away from the Placa de Catalunya Friendly English speaking staff Not a lot of bells and whistles bring your own alarm clock but there is a Nespresso machine in some rooms

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing  Beautiful hotel wonderful friendly staff that were always helpful Gorgeous contemporary pool area Amazing breakfast choice Complimentary snacks and soft drinks in the afternoon Quiet room at the back

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: would not give this 4 star hotel Bathroom really really bad very low sink faucet bath dos inefficient and not good bath water instead of down the drain accumulated And of course the price is too high I would not give this 4 star hotel   Excellent hotel location very good hotel staff good breakfast tea time is worth improving A large room

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The hotel was nicely located near lots of excellent eats The staff was very helpful and had wonderful suggestions our experience wouldn t have been without them And tea time was a nice treat in the afternoon after a long day walking in the city

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: bed not so comfortable the breakfast is limited small breakfast room and little selection before we stay much cheaper hotel maybe same line catalonia ramblas 4 much cheap and much comfortable bed and big breakfast pleace and much selection  good location nice staff

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing   Stayed for our wedding anniversary and we were treated by the hotel to a bottle of fizz on ice and some nice fresh fruit in our room on arrival Worth booking a room with terrace for the extra comfort and luxury

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Dinner menu in the restaurant was a little limited but still great good value food and wine  The team were fantastic Everyone that we came into contact with was extremely friendly helpful and genuinely seemed to care about ensuring that we had a great experience The room was extremely clean and comfortable with a great bed Breakfast was worth getting up for with something for just about anybody fabulous choice from freshly cooked to continental to typically Spanish even something for people needing a hair of the dog

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: excellent staff very helpful The location is excellent and the hotel is outstanding We were very glad to stay there and hope to return We especially enjoyed the terrace room

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The air conditioning made strange noises and was not effective enough The hand basin did not drain properly and leaked onto the cupboard underneath it Both easily remedied and did not detract from the experience Considering that our luggage never arrived at the airport and we were without any clothing for two days the manager on the day of our departure missed an opportunity to take advantage of an exercise in good public relations by demanding 28 euros to do some laundry four small pieces for us The rest of the staff were extremely sympathetic and supportive and he spoilt it by being so small minded Perhaps he should go back to hotel school to learn that small acts of kindness under extreme situations can go a long way to creating a lasting and positive impression This comment is really NOT about the 28 euros its about the principle Especially knowing that a survey would follow What an asshole   The staff were terrific Helpful and particularly pleasant at all times The late afternoon complimentary tea and snacks is a very nice touch

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: This was the perfect ending to a really great tour of the countries in the Mediterranean The location and amenities were excellent We will definitely return

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Only problem was that our stay was too short   This hotel is in a perfect location for exploring Barcelona Staff were excellent we were upgraded to a suite on the top floor with large terrace and great views Very clean room most comfortable bed spacious bathroom Loved it

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: We could not find fault with the hotel   Probably the best hotel we have stayed in Staff were exceptionally friendly and helpful yet discreet facilities were great and hotel spotlessly clean Particularly loved the complimentary tapas in the afternoon early evening and our room with a terrace was super

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Besides 1 hair in the bath I couldn t fault it   Large spacious superior room Nice toiletries and goodies to take with you Beautiful decor Lovely swimming pool to come back to at the end of the day after a day trekking around Barcelona in the summer heat Aircon was perfect too Complementary non alcoholic drinks and snacks in th bar in the afternoon

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing  Fantastic location for visiting Barcelona Walking distance to many of the sights The rooms are very comfortable with tea and coffee making facilities Good breakfast Loved the complimentary afternoon tea The hotel had secure on site parking

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: the rooms were beautiful and large and the staff was very helpful We were not there for very long or often as there is so much to see in Barcelona but it is a great location for walking to just about everything

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing bad to say   The room was lovely and the beds extremely comfortable It was very central being only 5 minutes walk from La Ramblas but what stood out the most where the staff Everyone was very helpful and very welcoming However I have to say the barman Dani excelled at his job and he makes a great Mojito Hope to go back again one day

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Great location Great staff Very welcoming and helpful Loved rooftop pool and snacks with afternoon tea Easy walk to city s best shopping and restaurants

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The room was very small   Lovely room and staff very helpful on arrival and also through our stay The location was central and walking distance to all main attractions and shopping The breakfast area is lovely and the food excellent

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: I really love this hotel and look forward to visiting again The rooms are both beautiful and comfortable including a bath with a lovely rain shower the staff is friendly and extremely helpful and the terrace and pool are a refreshing break after a day of sightseeing I especially love the complimentary tea and refreshments provided every afternoon way to go

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Excellent location close to everything but still lovely and quiet rooms A big shout out to the lovely Felipe who was always super friendly and helpful with a smile on his face

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: All was good  A very clean hotel with a courteous and helpful staff Great restaurants nearby as well as public transportation Walking distance to the Gothic district and Las Ramblas street which leads to the sea

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: We loved our stay Breakfast was fantastic we both had our choice of eggs made everyday which were always tasty We also enjoyed having afternoon tea by the pool on a few occasions this was a great surprise that we weren t aware of when we booked We arrived a few hours early to check in and didn t expect our room to be ready so it came as a nice surprise that we were able to settle in immediately All staff were very friendly always making time to smile say hello

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The brunch so good and also the hostel service with free tea time from 5 00pm to 8 00pm with lovely dessert coffee and tea so good The location is amazing very convient to every visit spot The services people are so good and polite next we will back if we visite Spain again

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing in particular Didn t eat at hotel at all so review doesn t cover quality of breakfast etc at all Just a tad overpriced for size of room when compared hotels other large cities   Garden view room v quiet Decor up to date and pleasant Air cond one of the few hotels where worked ok and quiet

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Breakfast is a bit pricey if you are like us and only get down just in time before it finishes Probably our own fault to be fair It is an amazing spread but we settled for coffee and croissants elsewhere the second morning as we are always to late to do it justice   This hotel is just perfect Perfect location Staff are helpful and polite rooms are immaculate but best of all is tea time Such a lovely idea Free tea coffee fresh juice little sandwiches and bits and bobs served between 17 00 and 20 00 Just lovely after a busy day to sit down and recoup before getting ready to go out again Never experienced this any other hotel and I think more should give it consideration Just Lovely

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: This hotel was a real gem and excellent in every way The location was great and the staff was the best I have experienced anywhere We stayed for 3 nights prior to a cruise in room 102 I would highly recommend this hotel

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: No view from room  Friendly and helpful staff perfect location in centre yet quiet and relaxed in hotel complimentary snacks and drinks in afternoon early eve

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The corridor fire door to rooms 1 5 needs some attention People coming in late or going to breakfast in the morning is very annoying with the slamming of the door giving a interrupted sleep   The hotel was really clean and everything was immaculate The helpful very friendly staff The breakfast was one of the best I have had

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The service from front desk to breakfast turn down service was so professional and on point They were very courteous and accommodating It was an excellent stay I was so happy to choose this hotel for their treatment service and location

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The restaurant in the evening served nice food but the evening I ate there it was empty everyone else had gone elsewhere a pity More seriously I opted for one of Booking com s cheaper rooms and found myself in a room looking out onto a small covered courtyard about 6 7 floors deep Simply no usable daylight no view of the sky no idea what the weather was like outside without getting up and going downstairs and outside The room itself was excellent but personally I would have liked to have been able to see a bit of daylight My recommendation would be to book one of the rooms with a balcony which seem to be at the back of the hotel or one of the rooms at the front overlooking the Gran Via This is certainly what I will do next time I return to Barcelona and there will be a next time   Very close to town centre at least those parts most tourists visit eg Ramblas and also one of the main metro stations I would suggest that using the buses is not to be avoided as is suggested elsewhere some like the V13 bring you directly back from Barcelonetta to the hotel Just a little research is needed into the routes A ticket for 10 journeys is cheap and easy to use and you see some of the town and not just the wall of a tunnel Staff in hotel were all very helpful and pleasant Breakfasts were good including some savory dishes so frequently omitted Nespreso coffee was used which is also good much better than the older style of hotel coffee which is often poor although still not up to the proper barista style The Bathroom was more of an annex to main room but perfectly good whilst the shower was more like a proper wet room plenty of space to move around and a floor which was not slippy when wet Comfortable bed and plenty of storage space including a good sized safe big enough to put a professional camera into which for me is important There is a small swimming pool and some sun loungers available for those who like those things

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The breakfast had no variety from day to day Also there was ongoing construction work either in the hotel or outside which created quite a noise   very efficient hotel staff who were willing to help with all kinds of requests

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Could not sit in balcony due to noise from road and could also hear rumble of trains but would still recommend to friends   Exceptionally clean rooms were very modern and the added bonus of a rooftop pool and terrace

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Dinner menu options were limited would have liked to have perhaps seen Tapas selection or Steak option   Fantastic location within close proximity to The famous Ramblas Staff were truly exceptional and a real credit to the hotel Could not fault the breakfast and afternoon sandwiches and cakes included too Loved our stay amazing

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The superior room didn t offer anything better than the standard room i had one of each on my booking so it wasnt worth the extra money   Great location Nice additional touches such as water topup at night turn down

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Excellent customer service clean rooms a great outdoor pool and seating area The breakfast had a fantastic selection of fresh food and drinks The hotel is an ideal location for all tourist destinations A superb hotel

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Can t think of anything  Comfy bed Quiet could hardly hear the neighbours faced the pool area up on 5th floor Free snacks from 5 8pm in the bar was nice Didn t charge for bottled water Also could open window and have a break from aircon

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The only thing I did not like was that the split bed moved around and I was unable to sleep using the full size of the bed as the beds would part This needs to be addressed to achieve a truly exceptional stay   The breakfast choice was sensational I thoroughly recommend you take the breakfast included option especially if you have an early start because very little is open early The gymnasium was ideal for holiday exercise The bar staff and room attendants were excellent Proximity to everything was perfect The rooms were quiet and the room climate could be adjusted accurately

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The restaurant presents itself as one with a restaurant but it is in the breakfast room which looks like a breakfast room Because it does not attract many customers it was not an appealing option for dining fortunately there are many good restaurants in the neighborhood   We had a superior double room on the quiet back side of the hotel Very elegant and private we slept well You can t beat the location which is near central transportation hub and also near major attractions Other hotel guests were well behaved i e no noisy partyies in the middle of the night etc

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing all fine   Everything was good Staff friendly and very helpful Breakfast buffet was excellent with large choice of dishes including ingredients for a Bloody Mary for anyone who had over indulged the night before

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Couldn t fault it  The location and also the staff highly recommended will definitely be going back A bottle of champagne waiting in our room for my wife s birthday was a nice treat

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Dinner could be better Not bad but not at the standards I would expect in a good 4 star hotel in Barcelona Chilled red wine was quickly replaced by wine at normal temperature by friendly waitress Must be a Spanish thing   Location is great

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing  Excellent location Very nice room and facilities Professional staff Various choices of breakfast This is my second time to stay here Still love it

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing   The staff were just brilliant We stayed in the nice suite with the jacuzzi as we were celebrating our engagement and they made us feel like we were staying in the nice suite Small touches like making a non alcohol cocktail for my fianc as she is pregnant free of charge One night we came back early and 5 mins later we had a complimentary bottle of champagne delivered with a fruit platter I got drunk she was amused they came and got the jacuzzi nice and hot when needed and always very polite and helpful Second to none

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Water on the floor of the bathroom after taking a shower but that s just a minor flaw   Excellent location Close to Placa Catalunya and Passieg de Gracia but the street is without much noise Elegant decoration Comfortable layout of the room Sufficient facilities Wifi very good Professional staff Not the warmest style but I like that Good varieties of breakfast Free late afternoon tapas and drinks I didn t have time to try it but looks good enough and the waitress there is quite tentative In a word the place worth every cent

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Instead of a box of tissues we were given only 5 pieces of tissue folded up in a tiny box to use daily Housekeeping was happy to give more boxes but we had to call housekeeping very troublesome I feel At the room rates we paid a box of Tissues is not too costly to provide  Excellent Location Staff would assist to rectify any situation we were unhappy with eg Water pressure of shower not high enough

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The rooms and bathroom is very small Expensive for what is offered   Not too much it was simply to put your head down in a clean place Tha amenities in the room are extremely limited Small soap bars no tissue paper comp what re was never replenished towels grey

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing  We were on our honeymoon so the hotel immediately upgraded us to a suite that was available Immaculate hotel great location and helpful staff

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Everything was perfect   Everything about this hotel was excellent I was celebrating a birthday and the hotel were kind enough to leave a bottle of champagne in our room

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: fabulous location excellent breakfast buffet and happy hour tapas well designed and plush rooms lighting and bathrooms friendly staff and excellent concierge service

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Even though I named me and my partner the hotel said it was a single booking and they charged an extra 22 Euro s for my partner Disgraceful seeing as we had booked one of their best rooms at 325 euros The reception lady dealt with it very poorly   The large bed and long pillows

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Mattress was commercially acceptable but not great Everything was just fine not the top standard Better luggage handling would have been welcome   Location and breakfast service was excellent

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: No comfortable chair in room Balcony rail was very low making balcony very limited This needs looking at   Bed very comfortable Superb location Very nice interior of hotel

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Pity that the room windows let onto an internmal well with little light Rooms facing outwards cost more  The staff were smiling and helpful and made us feel welcome Hotel well placed for Rambla and Gaudi buildings in Passeig Food was good

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: One morning breakfast service wasn t very good and my son couldn t even make a cup of tea because the machines were acting up The the sound of the underground directly below our room was a bit unnerving   The location

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The hotel is ideally located within easy walking distance of many of the favorite sites Gaudi buildings the Gothic quarter restaurants The staff is absolutely fabulous all speak beautiful English and were extremely helpful with tourist information and even straightening out an airline problem The hotel is completely modern with many conveniences Cannot recommend highly enough

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: It s a an ideal location to the main sites in Barcelona A very clean and well facilitated hotel The staff are extremely helpful and couldn t have been more helpful throughout our stay Would thoroughly recommend

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Great location in the center of Barcelona Hotel is very beautiful and clean Hotel s stuff are highly professional and very kind I will definitely return to this hotel It was a perfect stay

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Paid extra for room with view for my husband and I it was much smaller than out daughters inner room The problem I had was that the toilet which was behind a sliding door was probably only six foot from the bed so not much privacy However loved the hotel so if I came again would book the bigger room   Lovely hotel and in a great location Staff were helpful room and hotel spotless

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The service of the restaurant s staff is poor When we come in they don t serve us at all The blanket is too heavy and you may feel too hot to sleep during night   The pillow is so comfy

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The price was quite expensive for 4nights only we thought breakfast was included when we booked via this website however on arrival we all noted it was not included Breakfast really should be included considering the price   The hotel was very welcoming accommodating and provided us with all the local information we required The rooms were clean and were cleaned everyday with little extra goodies The location is also spot on not to far and not to near

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Well equipped nice and quiet room due to soundproofing we didn t hear anything from the noise of the street Very good location Helpful and kind staff We liked tea time snack

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Parking in the same building with easy access to the car Breakfast buffet was super We slept really good on the mattress Welcoming staff and helpful Pet friendly

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The staff helped me get a fruit plate for my husband on the occasion of his birthday just as I requested at no extra charge Everyone was very welcoming and friendly

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Afternoon tea waiter s manner diffident despite hotel saying wanted to extend welcome but served teapots without lids except on the last day Didn t ask what type of tea was wanted nor if milk should be brought Sandwiches dried up too Early flight meant couldn t have breakfast and though offered sandwiches to take to airport we declined for obvious reasons yet didn t get offer to take price of breakfast off room rate for last day   Location perfect for airbus RENF plus for walking to all the major visitor attractions of the City even if the admissions were pricey but didn t begrudge that with Sagrada de Familia Free admission to Picasso museum first Sunday of the month was a pleasant surprise and Tour Moderniste led by student employed by local tourist office was an excellent introduction for the holiday This walk with others was advertised by hotel so to be recommended And Tibidabo not to be missed nor Montjuic with trip in cable car down across harbour to beaches thoroughly lovely holiday and hotel provided restful haven even if couldn t use jacuzzi as just not quite warm enough at this time of year

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The evening meal in the restaurant was tasteless and very disappointing but there are several nice restaurants and tapas bars nearby We only decided to eat in the hotel because it was pouring with rain outside   The breakfast selection as wondeful the staff couldn t have been more helpful location and cleanliness of hotel were both outstanding

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Too man amenities in room writing paper and envelop Think about the environment less amenities in bathroom   Late arrival kitchen open till 23 00 with out any complaint

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: A beautifully set up hotel right in the heart of Passeig de Gracia close to Metro sights and shops A really nice touch is the free afternoon tea from 5 8

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: NA  Fantastic hotel super friendly staff and great attention to detail As an added bonus they also offer complementary drinks and snacks between 5pm and 8pm

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Breakfast statt time could be made earlier half hour eould be most helpful Having an 8 00 tour the 7 30am start time for nreakfas wad rather tight   Staff were helpful and kind

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Amazing staff very helpful and honest Stayed four nights with my girlfriend Had an amazing time While we didn t spend much time in the hotel the time we did spend was very enjoyable Very clean great bar staff never waited for anything Location was perfect And price even better I got a lot more than what I paid for

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: No mirror in bedroom could it be attached to back of wardrobe door Wardrobe space inadequate for two people or even one person staying for more than a day or two   Location Friendly staff Comfortable bedroom Terrace was generous on first floor adjacent to pool

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing to fault   The staff was extremely attentive and dedicated to our wellbeing Top level receptionists and the Barman Dan is doing a superb job The hotel itself is amazing and would deserve to be a 5 Location is highly recommended and we will definitely be back Thank you for the brilliant experience

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The cost of the breakfast was a little on the high side   From the moment we arrived we were treated like frequent guests Staff was extremely friendly and helpful Rooms were clean and comfortable Our room faced the street and it was really quiet Loved the afternoon tea and snacks Great location

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing  The location is perfect Staff are helpful Room is clean Bathroom also clean Bed is comfortable Hotel is closed to most of the interested points And transportation What else the hotel is perfect Far to crowd

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: We cannot think of a negative   The location is excellent easy walking distance to lots of restaurants and Las Ramblas Great staff very friendly and helpful Overall great hotel would highly recommend

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Everything This recently renovated hotel is classy clean and very comfortable From the warm welcome at reception after we parked our car in their secure underground car park to the moment we checked out and drove away everything was perfect The staff were professional helpful and friendly at all times The breakfasts were superb with every possible combination of hot cold food and drinks available and were available until 11 00 am The room we booked was a Superior Double which was around 20 sq meters in size and very well appointed and quite classy with one of the largest and most comfortable beds we ever slept in There was a well stocked mini bar with complimentary Still and Sparkling water which was replenished daily There was also tea and coffee making facilities in the room and we had a lovely complimentary bottle of Cava in our room on arrival The room overlooked the rear of the hotel and through the rather grand double opening windows we looked down on the superb modern pool and lounge area which was very quiet and peaceful The WiFi is free and there is excellent coverage and a strong signal throughout the hotel including the bedroom and all public areas And you don t have to constantly re log on every time you come and go in the hotel it was seamless The location was great too as the hotel is just a couple of minutes walk from the main square in Barca Placa de Catalunya and just a couple of minutes on from there to La Rambla The Gothic Quarter is around a ten mins walk away and 30 mins will take you to the Sagrada Familia unfinished Cathedral of Gaudi A really lovely hotel which we would stay at again in a heartbeat Great service great rooms and decor and absolutely great value for money Gracias

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Good location in Central Barcelona Accessible to everything you need Staff were very warm helpful Contemporary design inside the rooms and the lobby

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The location of the hotel to the old district and shopping areas is superb The staff are super friendly and go out of their way to help you out The breakfast was vast and tasty suiting everybody s needs including a gluten free section with its own separate cheese and ham section We also had new year s eve dinner at the hotel and it was fantastic Check in and check out were very swift and an added bonus is that every afternoon from 5 8pm they serve free tea service with sandwiches and tarts Will definitely revisit

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Bed quality although OK for a 4 stars hotel Superior room feels a pretty small in space  Friendliness of all the staff reception bell boys restaurant all Location only 7min walk to the main Rambla Great tapas and refreshments service at no additional charge everyday from 5om to 8 30pm

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Nothing  Staff Maria from the receptionist is the best She gave us good recommendations on where to eat and where yo go Always smiling and willing to help Stayed in several nice hotels but good staff is always key for people to most likely return Rooms nice big and clean rooms Location near the metro Breakfast the best so far

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: I have eating breakfast with my daughter 10years old I have found out that I have been charged for two adults even my daughter Should be charged 50 of normal   Great location super good bed and very clean bathroom

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: We were unable to have lunch in the restaurant on Christmas Day as it had been fully booked It would have been simple for the staff to have asked us if we wanted lunch when we made the booking I would have expected residents to have priority in the restaurant

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The bedroom was spacious especially for a city hotel bathroom always beautifully cleaned and tidied I loved the tasty turndown chocolates everynight what a lovely touch The crowning jewel of the hotel is the staff housekeeping bar and front desk all always friendly confident and available to advise or simply greet

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: holdiday there wasn t long enough  the hotel was in an excellent spot handy to most things metro stations taxis shops tourist sites etc the staff were all helpful friendly especially the desk staff who helped us with our enquiries on how to get to places both inside and outside the city loved your idea of afternoon teas though the only down side was no tea or coffee with it we d stayed at another catalonia and it was just as nice

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Would like to have the option of a continental breakfast rather than full buffet   Without prompting I was given a bottle of champagne as it was my birthday What a treat

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: We had no dislikes  The moment that you walked into the door and approached the front desk you immediately felt welcomed Hospitality at it s finest

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Terrible smell in the rooms rusty bathroom doorframe expensive and not exceptionally good breakfast scrambled standard TV channels Staff knocking at the door and coming in anyway to offer good night bonbons at 9 o clock in the evening can be pretty disturbing   Location fast internet

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The hotel needs a larger sign on the wall Very difficult to spot Drove around for an hour after not realising we had been right outside the door Absolute nightmare   Comfortable room and very friendly staff

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: had to change room the standard rooms are not right too small not well equiped dark Just for 30 EUR more you get a room that is like moving from a 3 star hotel to a 5 star Massive differende All staff were awesome but just on recepcionist in the evening not too helpful   Superior room has massive distance You either get superior or don t go

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The place lacks soul very stark and this is reflected by the austere staff who were very helpful and professional but rarely cracked a smile  Great location very clean huge bed

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: When I check in I was force to pay more as I had booked a double room but forget to add my wife on the booking The man in front desk are rude but the rest of them are great   The breakfast is great and most of the staff are nice

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: No bad experiences This is really minor but they could use a more efficient way to serve coffee at breakfast than the single Nespresso machine   Location close to the Barrio Gotico and the major shopping thoroughfare Passeig de Gracia but much quieter Close to a lot of restaurants both inside and outside of the Barrio Gotico Close to some great restaurants on side streets with a more neighbourhood feel Staff was very helpful with restaurant suggestions and making reservations The best restaurants we visited we would have never found if it had not been for staff recommendations Very comfortable room of a good size Superior room Hotel was extremely clean Our room was at the back so it was very quiet We were overlooking the pool area though so it may be noisier in the summer we visited in November Great breakfast

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: It was really difficult to work the toilets I had to press long and hard and still only small amount of water came down   I really liked the little courtyard that was attaced to the room I thought the shower was superb it was quite large and had a big rain effect shower head And the coffee machine in my room Excellent breakfast

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The only thing that was a minor negative was the shower over the bath was slightly awkward to access This was the only thing   Fantastic comfortable stylish hotel Great location just far enough away from the crowds of La Rambla but close enough to walk to Metro station within a minute Staff were super helpful friendly and polite Nothing too much trouble Welcome drink free Afternoon Tea snacks each day Chocolate on our pillow each night We had a ground floor room at the back of the hotel which was really quiet despite the hotel being on a fairly busy main road Excellent would highly recommend and would definitely go back again The Aerobus arrives and departs from Placa Catalyna which is no more than a five minute walk away

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: We loved the nightly chocolate delivery and the special bottle of Champayne because we were on our Honeymoon The rooms were beautifully decorated and very comfortable

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Wonderful property and great staff We traveled with a 2 year old and the hotel provided a very comfortable large pack and play for our daughter Great views from the 7th floor terrace rooms Perfect location for exploring the City Enjoyed the complementary happy hour

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Be careful to park your car at the back side of the garage If it is raining your car will suffer from the calc water from the building   good location Very nice and clean room at the back side of the building Little or traffic noise Javier has helped us extremely well

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The staff were very helpful and Friendly and the Hotel was of a high standard I can honestly say that I would stay here again when I return to Barcelona

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Breakfast for 16 19 euros is very expensive  Very clean Newly renovated hotel Modern and cosy place to stay Quiet but just in the middle of everywhere

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Limited public space for drinks at the bar but would not stop me from staying here again   The location of the hotel is excellent Popular sights are either within easy walking distance or accessible via public transport

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: When we arrived we were shown to our room However we discovered that the bathroom door was missing and what remained was the broken frame with broken glass fragments in it We complained and were immediately given another room but it was disappointing to think that the hotel staff clearly knew about this already and gave us the room hoping that we would think it was a modern twist to the room to not have a bathroom door   The location was great close to las ramblas but not too close Staff were very friendly and helpful and the hotel and room were spotless Nice touches such as chocolates in the room every day

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Lack of hooks to hang things up in the bathroom This should be easy to fix but fairly common in h tels The hotel if you are arriving by car is not very visible from the road   The hotel itself is a great place Some very interesting features The friendliness and helfpfulness of the staff Breakfast is excellent and plentiful

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: The only window of the room looked out on a very small patio so you had to keep the curtains closed if you did not wanted to look directly into another room made the room very dark The tea time snack offered by the hotel was to be honest beneath the standards you would expect of this hotel   Comfortably good beds Nice and helpful staff Super good location near the Place Catalunya Ideal for city trippers

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Great location metro at 50m moreover Beautiful modern and stylish hotel Spacious comfortable and tastefully decorated room Superb breakfast with smiling staff What else does one want

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Staff was very friendly and attentive Breakfast was great good selection We stayed in the Imperial Suite having the private terrace with a hot tub made our stay even more enjoyable

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: We were on the first floor at the front and the traffic was a bit noisy You would have to keep the windows closed   Its a great location right beside the metro station and within 5 minutes walk of the two Gaudi houses and 10 to 15 minutes to the Ramblas Its a nice touch serving snacks from 5pm

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: I took advantage of laundry service but was not returned as expected before I checked out Fortunately I was back in Barcelona two weeks later and was able to pick it up A negative that they missed their deadline for return but positive that I was able to retrieve it   Breakfast buffet was exceptional fabulous selection and well worth the 18e if my memory is correct Could even make yourself a Bloody Mary if one is so inclined Has smoking rooms if that is important to you

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Can t think of anything I would change   Excellent staff and location Sumptious breakfast Very confortable room and bath Would recommend to friends

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Centrally located Walking distance to Bari Gotic El Raval and even Gracia if you re comfortable with a longer walk Loved it Have been to Barcelona several times and this is hands down the best hotel we have stayed at for its price point Better than many higher priced hotels Close enough to touristy areas without being in them

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Our room is gloomy walls are dark grey and there is no window they don t provide a box of tissues instead they bring bocket tissues  Location is very good staff are the only thing that i like they are very freindly and understand English very well lobby and services there is excellent

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: we were in room 111 and it was quiet very clean and generally comfortable for sleeping It is however quite small for two adults The bathroom was sizeable with good lighting and mirrors Water from the shower tended to spill all over the floor because there was no door That made an unnecessary mess There was one hook beside the shower but nowhere else in the bedroom or bathroom to hang towels or dressing gowns The bathroom towel rail heater was too high on the wall and so we couldn t use it for that purpose These were the only negatives in an otherwise great experience   The staff were warm welcoming and helpful Then nespresso machine in the room free afternoon tea was a lovely touch after a long day sightseeing around this beautiful city Location was excellent We would definitely stay here again

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Having to leave   We stayed during the week of the bank holiday 31 August in a double room with a terrace The staff were very attentive and really made us feel welcome especially my little one A special mention thanks to the chamber maids who really made an effort to make sure everything was perfect It has a nice swimming pool The location of the hotel was spot on and really handy for the places we wanted to visit It s about a 30 minute walk to the beach and about 15 minutes to the ramblas The metro is literally on the doorstep and the train from and to the airport runs through it There was a small issue with the bed but they offered to move us to another room which I said wasn t necessary as I had unpacked Instead the chamber maids found a way to work around the problem They provided an iron and board when asked to Loved the free drinks and nibbles in the late afternoon very appreciated The daily supply of free bottled water was brilliant We will definitely stay here again next time we visit Barcelona which I hope is soon

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: but the staff of the night was like security nothing else They answered everything we don t know ask at the morning   The staff during the day was perfect the breakfast was amazing especially late breakfast was very helpful for this stay for us

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Front lobby is very sparse and unattractive compared to the rest of the hotel Not an appropriate introduction to the overall hotel which is really lovely and comfortable  Great location and nice job updating older hotel Very attentive staff

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup

Hotel_Name: Catalonia Passeig de Gr cia 4 Sup
Full_Review: Grease marks from hands on wardrobe doors Water service pipe running constantly in appt shower made sleeping difficult Very small room for the price Cleaner left dirty glasses in bathroom after clean Did not make clean sheets every day which we would expect in this price hotel My husband had night sweats and sheets remained damp Could not open window door as traffic too loud to speak relied on air con which kept turning itself to VERY cold Very expensive for what you get Reverb of hotel is getting worn out and faux floating timber floor throughout looks and sounds cheap   Nothing
